notes.fit: STRETCH. Genuine L&D/OD program role (P1/P1b) — design/develop/deliver training, onboarding, needs assessments, LMS, adult-learning theory. NOT clerical/benefits-admin despite RxBenefits being a PBO. Strong skill match (InGenius: needs assessments + 3 programs + 600+ trainings; MS Org Psych USC).
notes.yoe_note: JD asks Minimum 5 years; Jamie has ~3 yrs + MS = 2-yr stretch. Applied per recalibrated rule (5-yr ask is stretchable, not a hard stop).
notes.hard_stop_check: PASS — no explicit 'no sponsorship' clause, no ITAR/US-Person requirement. Proceeded.
notes.auth_flow: LinkedIn Apply -> external ADP ATS. ADP OTP email verification: code retrieved from Jamie's Gmail (jamiecheng0103@gmail.com) via workspace-mcp, entered, verified. No password/account-creation needed (OTP magic-link login).
notes.resume_upload: MCP file_upload sandbox rejected disk path. Used Simplify browser-extension autofill -> attached Jamie's stored resume (YiChieh_Cheng_resume.pdf, her real base resume) to the ADP file input. Base resume, not the L&D-tailored variant (sandbox blocked the tailored PDF), but truthful and accepted as application of record.
notes.ai_review_optout: Simplify auto-checked 'opt out from AI resume review' = Yes (neutral/pro-applicant; left as-is).

screening_answers.desired_salary: $80,000 USD Annually (DEFAULTED — within posted $67.2k-$84k range; FLAG for Jamie to confirm)
screening_answers.anything_else: Brief truthful L&D intro in Jamie's voice (needs assessments w/ 25+ stakeholders, 3 programs, 600+ webinar participants, MS Org Psych). NOTE: ADP review-page summary showed this free-text field as blank — may not have persisted; it was optional/non-required.

notes.demographics: Woman/Female, Not Hispanic or Latino, Asian, Not a protected veteran, No disability (per profile).
notes.esignature: Yi-Chieh Cheng (typed e-signature on Self-Attest step)
notes.verification: Review page read-back confirmed all values truthful BEFORE submit. Final confirmation = green 'Application Submitted!' banner observed post-submit.
